title: Stensen's Colony

{{Quote|On Stensen's Colony there are Ghothian slime pools which display a greater degree of intelligence than you did when you initiated this project.|Hyndis Kogler's message to Doctor Tobias|<ref name="IS2" />}}
'''Stensen's Colony''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="IS2" /> situated in the [[Stensen's Colony system/Legends|Stensen's Colony system]], a part of the [[Stensen sector/Legends|Stensen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC Stensen" /> [[Ghothian slime pool]]s,<ref name="IS2" /> which originated in<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=[[Ghothian slime pool]]s|system=[[Ghothia system/Legends|Ghothia system]]|legends=1}}</ref> the [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] [[Ghothia system/Legends|Ghothia system]],<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> could be found there.<ref name="IS2" />

At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Hyndis Kogler]], an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] service, sent a message to their fellow Intelligence member [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Tobias]]. Extremely upset with a recent initiative by Tobias, in the message Kogler claimed that some Ghothian [[Slime/Legends|slime]] pools on Stensen's Colony exhibited a "greater degree of intelligence" than Tobias did when coming up with their plan. Imperial Intelligence later included the message in a report prepared for an Imperial [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]], which in turn was added by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] to a compilation of Imperial documents for Alliance [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and other Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="IS2" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Impsourcebook.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Stensen's Colony was introduced in the ''Imperial Sourcebook''.]]
Stensen's Colony was first mentioned in the [[1989]] ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Greg Gorden]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[roleplaying game]] source article published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine, placed Stensen's Colony—misspelled as "Stenson's Colony"—in the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process, its [[canon]]icity within the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity was never confirmed.<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Stensen's Colony [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Stensen's Colony, in grid square I-16,<ref name="TEA" /> and the [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the book later overrode the ''Voyages SF'' 13 placement by instead establishing that the system was located in the Stensen sector.<ref name="EAOC Stensen" />
